metadata.description: Azure region for all resources. Pinned to lab region.
Resource group that will hold the dashboard.
Lab resource group containing the Windows Server VMs the dashboard manages.

Whether to assign Virtual Machine Contributor on the lab RG to the UAMI. Set to false if the deploying principal does not have role-assignment rights on the lab RG; you can do that step manually later.
Whether to deploy the three Container Apps (postgres, api, web). Set to false to keep the deployment to infra only.
Container image tag (matches what was pushed to ACR by build-and-push.ps1).
Postgres backend mode. "container" runs an in-env postgres container with Azure Files (NOT recommended — chmod fails on SMB). "managed" provisions Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server B1ms.
Postgres password. Required when deployApps=true. For "managed" mode this is the flex-server admin password and the api app DATABASE_URL.
RUNAS_MASTER_KEY for AES-256-GCM encryption of password run-as creds. 32 bytes base64. Empty disables password run-as in the UI.
Entra (Azure AD) tenant ID for dashboard auth. Required when deployApps=true.
Entra app registration client ID (also the API audience). Required when deployApps=true.
Short name token used as a suffix to keep names globally unique-ish (ACR, storage).
Tags applied to every resource.
Region.
Tags.
Workspace name.
Region.
Tags.
ACR name (3-50 lowercase alphanumeric, globally unique).
Region.
Tags.
UAMI name.
ACR name in the same RG.
PrincipalId of the UAMI from the dashboard RG.
Region.
Tags.
Storage account name (3-24 lowercase alphanumeric, globally unique).
SMB file share name for Postgres data.
Quota in GiB for the pgdata share.
Region.
Tags.
ACA managed environment name.
Log Analytics customer (workspace) ID.
Log Analytics primary shared key.
Storage account hosting the pgdata SMB share.
SMB file share name for Postgres data.
Logical name surfaced to Container Apps when mounting the share.
PostgreSQL server name (3-63 lowercase alphanumeric or hyphen).
Administrator login (cannot be "azure_superuser", "admin", "administrator", "root", "guest", "public").
Administrator password.
Initial database to create.
Postgres major version.
Region.
Tags.
ACA managed environment resource id.
ACA env default domain (used to compute FQDNs).
Logical name of the env-level managed storage backing pgdata.
ACR login server (e.g. dscfleetdscacr.azurecr.io).
UAMI resource id (used for ACR pull + DefaultAzureCredential).
UAMI client id (DefaultAzureCredential needs this when multiple managed identities are attached).
Container image tag to deploy (e.g. git short SHA, or `latest`).
Postgres database user name.
Postgres database name.
Postgres password (random if omitted).
RUNAS_MASTER_KEY for AES-256-GCM encryption of password run-as creds. Base64, 32 bytes. Empty disables password run-as.
Azure subscription id where lab VMs live (passed to the API for Run-Command).
Default poll interval (seconds) advertised to agents.
Postgres mode: "container" uses an in-env postgres container with Azure Files storage; "managed" uses Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server.
When postgresMode=managed, the FQDN of the flexible server (e.g. dscfleet-pg.postgres.database.azure.com).
When postgresMode=managed, the admin user.
Entra (Azure AD) tenant ID for dashboard auth.
Entra app registration client ID (also the API audience).
